prompt: Add Slack webhook notifications for critical alerts

turns.content:
<task>
Add Slack webhook notifications for critical alerts. When an alert has severity=critical, send it to a Slack channel via incoming webhook.
</task>

.
  cmd/
    server/
      main.go
  internal/
    alerts/
      handler.go
      types.go
    notifiers/
      email.go
    config/
      config.go
  go.mod
  go.sum

1	 package alerts
2	 
3	 type Severity string
4	 
5	 const (
6	 	SeverityInfo     Severity = "info"
7	 	SeverityWarning  Severity = "warning"
8	 	SeverityCritical Severity = "critical"
9	 )
10	 
11	 type Alert struct {
12	 	ID       string   `json:"id"`
13	 	Title    string   `json:"title"`
14	 	Message  string   `json:"message"`
15	 	Severity Severity `json:"severity"`
16	 	Source   string   `json:"source"`
17	 }

1	 package notifiers
2	 
3	 import (
4	 	"fmt"
5	 	"net/smtp"
6	 )
7	 
8	 type EmailNotifier struct {
9	 	Host string
10	 	Port int
11	 	From string
12	 	To   string
13	 }
14	 
15	 func (e *EmailNotifier) Notify(title, message string) error {
16	 	body := fmt.Sprintf("Subject: %s\r\n\r\n%s", title, message)
17	 	addr := fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", e.Host, e.Port)
18	 	return smtp.SendMail(addr, nil, e.From, []string{e.To}, []byte(body))
19	 }

arguments.query: Slack incoming webhook API POST JSON format golang

turns.content:
1. Sending messages using Incoming Webhooks - Slack API - https://api.slack.com/messaging/webhooks
   POST JSON to webhook URL: {"text": "Hello"}
2. Slack Block Kit Builder - https://app.slack.com/block-kit-builder
   Visual tool for building rich Slack messages with blocks.
3. Go Slack Webhook Example - https://golangcode.com/send-slack-messages-without-a-library/
   Simple HTTP POST example for Slack webhooks in Go.

Sending messages using Incoming Webhooks

Make an HTTP POST request to your webhook URL:

POST https://hooks.example.com/services/XXXX/XXXX/XXXX
Content-type: application/json
{"text": "Hello, world."}

Rich formatting:
{"blocks": [{"type": "section", "text": {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Title*\nMessage"}}]}

Response: "ok" with 200, or error message with appropriate status code.

Rate limiting: 1 message per second per webhook.

arguments.title: Slack Incoming Webhook API

turns.content: Finding recorded: Slack Incoming Webhook API

arguments.summary: Researched Slack webhook API. Simple JSON POST with text field. Will create SlackNotifier following existing EmailNotifier pattern.

next_steps.description: Create internal/notifiers/slack.go with SlackNotifier struct and Notify method
Wire SlackNotifier into alert handler for critical severity

arguments.message: Slack notifications are wired up. Critical alerts will be sent to Slack with a rotating_light emoji prefix. Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in your config. Non-critical alerts still only go to email. The Slack notifier is nil-safe — if no webhook URL is configured, Slack notifications are skipped.

arguments.summary: Created SlackNotifier in internal/notifiers/slack.go with HTTP POST to webhook URL. Updated alert handler to send Slack notifications only for critical severity. Build succeeds.
arguments.final_answer: Added Slack webhook integration for critical alerts. SlackNotifier posts JSON to the webhook URL with formatted message. Handler dispatches to Slack only when severity=critical and webhook is configured.
